title: Model Economy Roll-Up
description: Authoritative shape of the model-economy aggregator output (cycle-112 FR-1). Conforms to SDD §3.2.1. Conservative shape: every cell value can be null because Phase A ships partial coverage (skill attribution 0%, cost coverage 35%, verdict_quality coverage 48%). Coverage block documents the gap honestly.

window.description: Aggregation window in compact form: 24h, 7d, 30d, etc.

since.description: ISO 8601 UTC lower bound of the window (inclusive).

now.description: ISO 8601 UTC upper bound of the window (the aggregator's notion of 'now').

log_path.description: Path of the MODELINV JSONL log that was stream-parsed.

total_envelopes.description: Count of envelopes that fell within the window after timestamp + filter gating.

with_skill_attribution.description: Count of envelopes whose payload carried skill / calling_primitive / phase / role / tier. SDD §0.3 finding: 0/808 today.

with_pricing_snapshot.description: Count of envelopes carrying payload.pricing_snapshot (35% coverage as of cycle-112 baseline).

with_verdict_quality.description: Count of envelopes carrying payload.verdict_quality (48% coverage as of cycle-112 baseline).

with_capability_evaluation.description: Count of envelopes carrying payload.capability_evaluation.estimated_input_tokens (50% coverage). Both pricing_snapshot AND capability_evaluation are required to compute cost; cost_coverage_pct is the joint denominator.

skill_attribution_pct.description: 100 * with_skill_attribution / total_envelopes. Surfaced in the text-mode coverage line for operator awareness of D-6 gap.

cost_coverage_pct.description: 100 * (envelopes with both pricing_snapshot AND capability_evaluation) / total_envelopes.

malformed_lines.description: Non-empty lines that failed json.loads. Stream-parse skips them; this counter surfaces the rate honestly per SDD §6 error table.

per_skill_model.description: Keyed by '<skill>|<model>' string. Per-cell aggregation results.

skill.description: Skill / calling_primitive identifier. '(unattributed)' when payload lacks attribution (100% today per SDD §0.3).

model.description: final_model_id (or models_succeeded[0] / models_requested[0] fallback). '(unknown_model)' if none resolved.

runs.description: Total envelopes bucketed to this (skill, model) cell.

cost_total_usd.description: Sum of input-side cost across priced runs in this cell. null when no run in the cell was priceable.

cost_per_run_usd.description: cost_total_usd / runs_with_cost. null when no run was priced.

cost_per_clean_output_usd.description: PRD §4 FR-1 primary metric. sum(cost where verdict_quality.status=='APPROVED' AND chain_health=='ok') / count(same). null when denominator is 0 (no clean runs in cell).

cost_input_only.description: True when tokens_output is unavailable in the MODELINV writer signature (current state). D-7 wires output tokens; this flag flips to false once that lands.

p95_latency_ms.description: 95th-percentile invocation_latency_ms across runs in this cell. null when runs == 0 or all invocation_latency_ms missing.

verdict_quality_healthy_pct.description: 100 * APPROVED-with-chain-health-ok / runs. null when no runs had verdict_quality data.

degradation_marker.description: PRD §4 FR-2: true when DEGRADED + FAILED >= 2 for this cell.

first_try_success.description: Count of runs where models_requested[0] == models_succeeded[0] (no fallback walk). Mirrors health.py first_try_success.

attempts.description: Count of times this model appeared in models_requested[] across runs in this cell.

unpriced_runs.description: runs - runs_with_cost. Surfaces the partial-priced reality at the row level.

model_config_ref.description: Origin of pricing data. Default is .claude/defaults/model-config.yaml@HEAD; --cost-snapshot <ref> swaps in historical.

substrate_health_window_summary.description: PRD R-5 mitigation: cross-reference to cycle-109 substrate-health for the same window. null when the cross-ref was not requested or could not be computed.
